title: エリザベス女王杯にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Queen Elizabeth II Cup, and we
can hear the voices of spectators as we pass the
stands.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
It's almost time! I've been looking forward to this
so much!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Me too! The most exciting part has to be the
"princess" showdown!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Ah, it's Lady Fine Motion! I'm sure she'll give us a
prim wave. She's so elegant!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess is sure to show off her
princess-y qualities too! ...Probably!

text_block_list.name: Spectators A and B
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This race is bound to be a thing of beauty...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...
A thing of beauty, huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you. Tell Fine she better not fool around out
there.
choice_data_list: I see you've come to watch.
I see you've come to watch.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I'm sure she'll be as flighty as ever...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And despite that, she'll still show everyone up
with that talent of hers.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And... that will be the end. I'm just here to verify
my theory.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Anyway, I took a bullet train over here, so I
intend to get my money's worth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even Air Shakur has her attention on this year's
Queen Elizabeth II Cup.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Let's show some GUTS!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: YEAH, GUTS!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Shudder...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The stage is set for a rowdy struggle!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Take a look, Fine! The crowd is really
worked up!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Nicely done, Kawakami. So this is how a Japanese
princess conducts herself.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You betcha! I've been preparing myself for this
day.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I've been dreaming about having a
showdown with you... It's a real dream match!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: A dream match!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Therefore! Let's duel it out head-on, fair and
square!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'm going to chew you up and spit you out, Fine!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I, umm...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh? Are you okay?! I didn't mean it literally!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: No, that's not it!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
My heart just feels all aflutter. It's like I have
goosebumps all over.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: That taunt left me all... jittery. I wonder why.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hah, I see. Is that all?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: The answer's simple! You want to pulverize me too!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That was your thirst for battle awakening! As your
rival, I consider it an honor to see it.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: My... thirst for battle?

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, Fine, but I must go.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
My rival is already waiting for me. But more than
anything, my heart is urging me onwards. I want
to race her—I want to win.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text: Farewell, Fine. Forgive me...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That is... unacceptable. If I were to allow myself to
acknowledge these feelings...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: No, I need to become a pillar!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I don't really know what you're talking about, but
I'm sure you'll figure it all out when we run!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Listen to me, Fine! All you need to do is take me
on with everything you got!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Right!
